title: Calling C API in verilator: Unsupported DPI argument of type REFDTYPE

features.name: dpi_c_import_task_with_struct_argument
features.description: Code should include a DPI-C import task with a struct-type argument passed by input reference
features.snippet:
struct packed { logic [7:0] field; } custom_struct_t;
import "DPI-C" context task example_dpi_task(input custom_struct_t cfg, input int unsigned channel, input int mode_select);
